zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna於1275年出生在立陶宛時，她的父親Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk28歲，母親Polotsk26歲。她和Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania至少有10個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1344年在立陶宛維爾尼奧斯 阿普斯可利迪斯維爾紐斯享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna于1275年出生在立陶宛时，她的父亲Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk28岁，母亲Polotsk26岁。她和Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania至少有10个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于1344年在立陶宛維爾尼奧斯 阿普斯可利迪斯維爾紐斯享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Olga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Scandinavian origin, originally derived from the Old Norse adjective heilagr ‘prosperous, successful’. It was imported by the Scandinavian settlers who founded the first Russian state in the 9th century. St Olga of Kiev ( d. 969 ) was a Varangian noblewoman who was baptized at Byzantium in about 957 and set about converting her people. The name was introduced to the English-speaking world in the late 19th century, but retains a distinctively Russian flavour.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna was born in 1275, in Lithuania, her father, Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk, was 28 and her mother, Polotsk, was 26. She had at least 10 sons and 7 daughters with Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania. She died in 1344, in Vilnius, Vilnius County, Lithuania, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna est née en 1275, à Lituanie, son père, Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Polotsk, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 10 fils et 7 filles avec Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania. Elle est décédée en 1344, à Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Lituanie, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna 1275 in Litauen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk 28 und ihre Mutter Polotsk 26. Sie hatte mit Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania mindestens 10 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1344 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Litauen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna è nata il nel 1275 nel Lituania, sua padre, Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Polotsk, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 10 figli e 7 figlie con Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania. Morì nel 1344, nel Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Lituania, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodnaが1275年にリトアニアで生まれた時，父Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotskは28歳，母Polotskは26歳であった。彼女はGediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuaniaとの間に少なくとも10人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1344年にリトアニアヴィルニアウス アプスクリティスヴィルニウスで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna(이)가 1275년 리투아니아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Polotsk(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 리투아니아 비니오스 아프스크리티스 비니우스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna nasceu em 1275, em Lituânia, seu pai, Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Polotsk, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 10 filhos e 7 filhas com Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania. Ela faleceu em 1344, em Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Lituânia, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna родилась в 1275 г. в местности Литва, её отцу по имени Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Polotsk, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 7 дочерей от Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania. Она умерла в 1344 г. в местности Вильнюс, вилняус апскритис, Литва в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess of Smolensk Olga Vsevolodna nació en 1275, en Lituania, su papá, Ivan Vsevolodovich Polotsk, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Polotsk, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos y 7 hijas con Gediminas Grand Duke Of Lithuania. Murió en 1344, en Vilnius, Vilniaus Apskritis, Lituania, a la edad de 69 años.
